= quote





Wraps a string in double quotes with escape sequences

== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.quoted = this.thing.quote()

# In:  {"thing":"foo\nbar"}
# Out: {"quoted":"\"foo\\nbar\""}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.literal = this.text.quote()

# In:  {"text":"hello\tworld"}
# Out: {"literal":"\"hello\\tworld\""}
----
